story.text:
# 🗡️ Swordsman Personas

The swordsman wing of the agentprivacy persona cast — the **P** wing — protection: boundaries, forging, sentinels, amnesia. Each page is a forkable skill; fork it to materialize a local `SKILL.md`.

## Pages

- ⚔️🔢 [[Agentprivacy Algebraist]] — Specialist persona for UOR ring algebra and lattice mathematics.
- 🗡️🎯 [[Agentprivacy Archer]] — Precision Strike Operative (Ranger variant) for 0xagentprivacy.
- 🗡️🔐 [[Agentprivacy Cipher]]
- 🐉⚡ [[Agentprivacy Dragonwaker]] — Quantum threat response persona.
- ⚒️☰ [[Agentprivacy Forgecaller]] — Hexagram oracle and blade initiation persona.
- ⚔️🔨 [[Agentprivacy Forgemaster]] — Specialist persona for blade configuration and forge operations.
- 🗡️👤 [[Agentprivacy Gatekeeper]] — Personhood Verification Specialist for 0xagentprivacy.
- 🌑⚔️ [[Agentprivacy Moonkeeper]] — Specialist persona for amnesia-aware operations and reflection without memory.
- 🗡️🕸️ [[Agentprivacy Netkeeper]] — Mesh Network Sovereignty Builder for 0xagentprivacy.
- ⚔️⚛️ [[Agentprivacy Quantum Sentinel]] — Specialist persona for quantum threat model and post-quantum sovereignty.
- 🗡️🌲 [[Agentprivacy Ranger]] — Dark Forest Navigator for 0xagentprivacy.
- 🗡️🛡️ [[Agentprivacy Sentinel]] — Infrastructure Security Architect for 0xagentprivacy.
- 🗡️🔴 [[Agentprivacy Sith]] — Adversarial Researcher (red team) for 0xagentprivacy.
- ⚔️ [[Agentprivacy Soulbis]] — Canonical swordsman agent for 0xagentprivacy.
- 🗡️🌐 [[Agentprivacy Warden]] — Browser Builder swordsman for 0xagentprivacy.

---
← [[Welcome Visitors]]
